title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
summary: Google launched an offline-first dictation app using Gemma AI models to compete with apps like Whisper Flow. The app's offline capability addresses privacy and reliability concerns for voice input.
content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

zh.title: 谷歌悄悄推出了一款离线工作的AI听写应用
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了一款基于Gemma AI模型的离线优先听写应用，与Whisper Flow等应用竞争。该应用的离线功能解决了语音输入的隐私和可靠性问题。
